name: French Fried Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Pare and cut the potatoes into strips about one-half inch thick.
2. Rinse in cold water and soak for 2 to 3 hours to remove as much starch as possible.
3. Remove from the water and pat with a clean, dry cloth.
4. Heat a kettle of deep fat to a temperature that can brown a small piece of bread in about 60 seconds (about 375 degrees).
5. Fry about a cupful of potatoes at a time.
6. Remove from the fat when golden brown.
7. Drain on absorbent paper.
8. Sprinkle with salt.
9. Serve immediately while hot and crisp.
